scripts.build: tsc && rm -rf dist/skills && cp -r src/skills dist/skills
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && vitest run src test/smoke test/scripts
scripts.test:online: npm run build && MYAPI_RUN_RESET=1 vitest run test/online
scripts.test:realistic: npm run build && MYAPI_RUN_REALISTIC=1 vitest run test/realistic/autonomous-company.test.ts
scripts.test:realistic:cleanup: npm run build && vitest run test/realistic/cleanup.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run build && MYAPI_RUN_RESET=1 vitest run src test/smoke test/scripts test/online
